commands: bun tools/ge.mjs okf quality audit --all --json --write reports/quality/baseline.json
bun tools/ge.mjs okf enrich plan --all --target L4 --write reports/enrichment/plan.json --json
bun tools/ge.mjs okf enrich shard --plan reports/enrichment/plan.json --out reports/enrichment/shards
bun tools/ge.mjs okf enrich prompt --shard <first-shard> --harness codex --out reports/enrichment/prompts/<first-shard>.codex.md
note: Full baseline/plan/shard artifacts are generated locally by the commands above and intentionally not committed to keep PRs reviewable.
